name: ERC-7702 EOA → Smart Account Delegation
description: Sign an EIP-7702 authorization that delegates the agent's EOA to a smart-contract implementation. The agent gains batch transactions, gasless txs, and session keys without changing addresses.
use_case: Agent's EOA wallet wants to batch 5 txs into 1 (approve + swap + supply). Pre-7702: 5 signatures, 5 gas costs. Post-7702: 1 signature, 1 gas cost, ~70% gas savings via shared overhead.

contracts.name: Safe Smart Account v1.5
contracts.note: Recommended ERC-7702 implementation. The agent signs a type-4 authorization tuple pointing to this address; the EOA's code then delegates to this Safe implementation.

contracts.name: ZeroDev Kernel v3.2
contracts.note: Alternative implementation — modular plugins, session keys, gas abstraction.

verification.criteria: Post-tx the EOA's code field on the state trie is non-empty and equal to the delegation prefix + implementation address.
